name: kmviz

metadata.name: kmviz
metadata.summary: A web interface for querying biological sequence indexes.

documentation:
# kmviz

![GitHub Release](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/tlemane/kmviz?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)
![PyPI - Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/kmviz?style=for-the-badge&color=blue&logo=pypi)
![Docker Image Version](https://img.shields.io/docker/v/tlemane/kmviz?style=for-the-badge&logo=docker&label=docker%20hub&color=blue)

![GitHub Actions Workflow Status](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/tlemane/kmviz/ci.yml?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&label=kmviz-ci)
![PyPI - Python Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/kmviz?style=for-the-badge&logo=python)

**kmviz** is a user-friendly web interface for interacting with biological sequence indexes. In a nutshell, it connects to multiple, local or distant, sequence indexes to performs sequence queries. Results can then be explored through *`tables`*, *`plots`*, *`sequence views`*, or even *`maps`* when metadata contains geographical information. Note that representations are fully customizable allowing to make production-grade figures.

:warning: **kmviz** is a work in progress!

See [kmviz documentation](https://tlemane.github.io/kmviz).

documentation: Initialization, like database login, should take place here

methods.name: kmviz.core.metadata.db.MetaDB.query
documentation:
Select a subset of metadata

```
param keys

A sequence of identifiers

returns

A dataframe with the metadata corresponding to the keys
```

documentation:
Get all metadata

:returns: A dataframe with all metadata

methods.name: kmviz.core.metadata.db.MetaDB.keys
documentation:
Get all fields

:returns: The list of all fields

methods.name: kmviz.core.metadata.db.MetaDB.geodata
kmviz.core.metadata.db.MetaDB.idx
documentation: :returns: The name of the field corresponding to entry identifiers

functions.name: kmviz.__main__.version
documentation: Show version and exit

functions.name: kmviz.__main__.infos
documentation: Get databases information

functions.name: kmviz.__main__.query
documentation: Make queries and get results as a json session file, viewable using a local kmviz instance. See kmviz app start session

functions.name: kmviz.__main__.metadata
documentation: Make queries and get results as a tsv dataframe

functions.name: kmviz.__main__.app
documentation: Start kmviz

functions.name: kmviz.__main__.start
documentation:
Start with flask server (recommended for single users)

 
Mode:
  - db (default)
  - session: Session mode, see https://tlemane/github.io/kmviz/)
  - plot: Plot mode, see https://tlemane/github.io/kmviz/)
  - api: Only start the kmviz REST API (see https://tlemane/github.io/kmviz/)

functions.name: kmviz.__main__.deploy
documentation: Deployment with gunicorn (recommended for multi-user instances)

functions.name: kmviz.__main__.config
documentation: Configuration helpers

functions.name: kmviz.__main__.check
documentation:
Valid configuration file.
 
With --with-init, the validation process also tries to init the app,
i.e. connect to databases, load plugins, etc

functions.name: kmviz.__main__.schema
documentation: Make JSON schema

functions.name: kmviz.__main__.template
documentation: Make configuration templates

functions.name: kmviz.__main__.plugin
documentation: Plugin helpers

functions.name: kmviz.__main__.list
documentation: List installed plugins

functions.name: kmviz.__main__.idx
documentation:
List kmviz component identifiers

 
This command is hidden in kmviz help and mainly
used as a helper for writing documentation

---
param idx: A unique id representing the query
param options: The user-defined options
param query: The query
returns: T

methods.name: kmviz.core.provider.provider.Provider.samples
documentation:
---
param index: The sub-index name
returns: The list of sample indexed by the sub-index, or a dict of list with one key
  per sub-index
---
